title: FNAF: Never Before
description: Upcoming features that (I) have not seen before in a FNAF mod
body:
This is the beta version of FNAF: Never Before
THIS IS MY FIRST MOD SO SORRY IF UPDATES ARE A: Small OR B: Take a bit
What version Beta 1.0.5  has:
-Red, Blue, Black, Light, Dark, Green tiles

-Lolbit mask

-8 floor tiles-

button 

-W.I.P pathfinding block

-a very w.i.p poster

-2 neon lights

-Fazgrass and Fazwood

-Ceiling light

-Gem scythe (not done (/give only rn) ) 

-4 Dev blocks (operator utilities) 

-8 paintings

-Golf club

-Iron rod

-Survival recipes
Helpers:
ShadowRiftz: Modeling
ProtonGames: Helping with the coding part of it!
And to everyone who's part of the discord for polls and other questions
